basic_details.job_title: AIIMS Kalyani Office Helper Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: All India Institute of Medical Sciences Kalyani (AIIMS Kalyani)
basic_details.short_information: All India Institute of Medical Sciences Kalyani (AIIMS Kalyani) Recruitment 2026: All India Institute of Medical Sciences Kalyani has released the official notification for 1 Office Helper posts, inviting applications from eligible candidates in West Bengal. This recruitment provides an excellent opportunity for candidates seeking stable and well-paid government jobs.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 45 years. Age relaxation for reserved categories will be as per government rules.

qualification.education_qualification: Higher Secondary (10+2) or equivalent with 3 years experience in NABL accredited laboratories or recognized hospitals or diagnostic centres, Bachelor or Diploma in Computer Applications (desirable)
qualification.details: Higher Secondary pass (10+2) or equivalent from a recognized board. 3 years' Experience working in NABL accredited laboratories or recognized hospitals or Diagnose Centre. Desirable: Bachelor or Diploma in Computer Applications from a recognised institute or university, knowledge of Hospital and Laboratory Management Software and Information System, suitable working Computer knowledge in Computer Applications, confidentiality management and Office management.

selection_process: Google Form Application Document Submission Shortlisting Written Test and/or Interview (offline) Document Verification Result Publication
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 22-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of AIIMS Kalyani to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: AIIMS Kalyani Office Helper Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the AIIMS Kalyani Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download AIIMS Kalyani Office Helper Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: AIIMS Kalyani Office Helper Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Higher Secondary pass (10+2) or equivalent from a recognized board. 3 years' Experience working in NABL accredited laboratories or recognized hospitals or Diagnose Centre. Desirable: Bachelor or Diploma in Computer Applications from a recognised institute or university, knowledge of Hospital and Laboratory Management Software and Information System, suitable working Computer knowledge in Computer Applications, confidentiality management and Office management.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Applications must be submitted online on or before 22-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of AIIMS Kalyani to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: AIIMS Kalyani Office Helper Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the AIIMS Kalyani Office Helper recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the Office Helper post at AIIMS Kalyani is 22nd July 2026. Ensure you complete the application process well before this deadline to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Office Helper position?
faq.answer: Candidates must have passed Higher Secondary (10+2) or an equivalent examination. Additionally, 3 years of relevant experience in NABL accredited laboratories, recognized hospitals, or diagnostic centers is mandatory.

faq.question: Q3. Is there any desirable qualification for the Office Helper role?
faq.answer: Yes, a Bachelor's or Diploma in Computer Applications is considered desirable. Knowledge of hospital and laboratory management software, information systems, and general computer applications is also beneficial.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the Office Helper post?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for applying to the Office Helper position is 45 years. Specific age relaxations may apply for candidates belonging to reserved categories as per government norms.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Office Helper position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Office Helper post will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 26,800 per month. This is a contractual position.

faq.question: Q6. How will candidates be selected for the Office Helper role?
faq.answer: The selection process involves an online application via Google Form, followed by document submission, shortlisting, a written test and/or interview, document verification, and finally, result publication.

faq.question: Q7. Is there an application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, according to the provided information, there is no application fee for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q8. What is the nature of the job?
faq.answer: The Office Helper position at AIIMS Kalyani is a contractual role. This means the employment will be for a fixed term as per the terms and conditions of the contract.

faq.question: Q9. Where is AIIMS Kalyani located?
faq.answer: AIIMS Kalyani is located in Kalyani, West Bengal, with the pincode 741245. Candidates applying should be willing to work in this location.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and apply online?
faq.answer: The official notification and the online application link can be found in the "Important Links" section of this article. It is highly recommended to download and read the official notification before applying.
